summary: None of the reviewed studies address long non-coding RNAs or neuronal outgrowth; therefore, the provided evidence neither supports nor refutes the claim that lncRNAs control neuronal outgrowth. Based solely on the input material, it can be concluded that such a relationship has not been established within these findings.
